series_metadata.series_description: Real Estate and Appraisal applications filed by course sponsors requesting certification of certain courses for continuing education purposes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy for the calendar year in which received, then microfilm. After microfiche has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area permanently., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Permanent
